---
title: "HYP-0004 Longer-Window XAP-XAB Pairs Robustness Test"
format: html
---

## Status

Initial run completed on 2026-06-19. Status: revise.

## Data

This experiment extends the `XAP-XAB` pair test to the Databento `GLBX.MDP3`
`ohlcv-1m` window from 2024-01-01 through 2026-06-19. The raw parent-symbol bars
are converted into return-spliced continuous root series before testing.

## Method

The run compares the same z-score and Mahalanobis rules used in `HYP-0003`, with
the same costs and turnover controls. The pair is still required to pass the
same train-window selection filters before the test segment is evaluated.

## Result

The strict longer-window selection gate rejected `XAP-XAB`:

| Pair | Selected | Reason | Observations | Train | Test | Return corr | Price corr | ADF p-value | Half-life bars |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| `XAP-XAB` | false | `spread_not_stationary` | 31,885 | 19,131 | 12,754 | 0.347 | 0.254 | 0.197 | 1513.4 |

The strict ADF cutoff is `0.10`, so the longer training spread is not stationary
enough under the original method.

## Forced Diagnostic

A separate `config_forced.yaml` run disabled selection so the same trading rules
could still be inspected on the longer out-of-sample segment. This is diagnostic
only.

| Method | Gross return | Cost sum | Net return | Sharpe | Max drawdown | Active fraction | Turnover | Trades |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| Z-score | 7.93% | 1.02% | 6.83% | 7.14 | -4.78% | 44.22% | 67.98 | 85 |
| Z-score + Mahalanobis filter | 3.79% | 0.44% | 3.33% | 6.02 | -2.43% | 16.70% | 29.57 | 35 |
| Mahalanobis | -2.42% | 2.69% | -5.01% | -3.95 | -7.28% | 63.07% | 179.23 | 205 |

Splitting around the previous short-window test start:

| Method | Segment | Gross return | Cost sum | Net return | Trades |
|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| Z-score | 2025-10-29 to 2026-04-08 | 5.34% | 0.76% | 4.55% | 61 |
| Z-score | 2026-04-08 to 2026-06-18 | 2.45% | 0.26% | 2.18% | 24 |
| Z-score + Mahalanobis filter | 2025-10-29 to 2026-04-08 | 2.83% | 0.38% | 2.44% | 30 |
| Z-score + Mahalanobis filter | 2026-04-08 to 2026-06-18 | 0.94% | 0.07% | 0.87% | 5 |
| Mahalanobis | 2025-10-29 to 2026-04-08 | -1.87% | 1.72% | -3.54% | 122 |
| Mahalanobis | 2026-04-08 to 2026-06-18 | -0.57% | 0.97% | -1.53% | 83 |

## Decision

Revise. The strict longer-window test weakens the original short-window
Mahalanobis claim. The z-score rule is more robust in the forced diagnostic. The
hybrid lowers turnover and drawdown but gives up too much return at the current
Mahalanobis threshold. The pair failed the stationarity gate, so this remains a
research lead rather than a deployable strategy.
